blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
